settings.headline: Meet EverFlow
settings.text: Designed in our BlissLabs, EverFlow is the result of years of testing. Lightweight like a second skin, stretchy in all directions, and buttery smooth against your body.

features_grid.title: Moisture Wicking
features_grid.text: Pulls sweat away from skin instantly

features_grid.title: 4-Way Stretch
features_grid.text: Moves in every direction with you

features_grid.title: Shape Retention
features_grid.text: Keeps its form wash after wash

settings.headline: Move in Style
settings.subtext: From yoga to street, our flare collection is built for women who refuse to choose between comfort and confidence.

reviews.name: Shreya K.
reviews.text: These are the most comfortable pants I've ever worn to a yoga class AND then immediately to brunch. The EverFlow fabric is insane — zero restriction, zero sweat show.

reviews.name: Prachi M.
reviews.text: Finally a brand that caters to tall women! The Tall fit is exactly right for my 5'9 frame. The flare falls perfectly at my ankle. Bought 3 colors already and honestly considering more.

reviews.name: Riya D.
reviews.text: The hidden pocket fits my entire phone. The waistband gives incredible tummy support without being uncomfortable. I wore this on a 6-hour flight and felt great the entire time.

items.question: How does the sizing work?
items.answer: We offer XS to 3XL. For the Lite Tall fit, it's designed for heights 5'7" and above. Our size guide on the product page includes detailed measurements. If you're between sizes, size up for a more relaxed fit.

items.question: Can I wear it for high-intensity workouts?
items.answer: The EverFlow fabric is great for low to medium intensity — yoga, pilates, walking, travel, and everyday wear. For high-intensity like running or HIIT, we'd recommend our AirMelt or Aerocool range.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: We offer 15-day returns and exchanges for all orders. Items must be unworn and in original packaging. Exchanges are processed within 3–5 business days. Returns are fully refunded within 7 business days.

items.question: Do you ship across India?
items.answer: Yes! We ship pan-India. Orders are dispatched within 1–2 business days. Standard delivery takes 3–6 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹499.

settings.tagline: Premium activewear for Indian women who move with intention. Built for comfort, designed for confidence.
